title: RYR1 / desflurane
summary: Patients with the rs118192168 AA genotype may develop malignant hyperthermia when treated with volatile anesthetics (desflurane, enflurane, halothane, isoflurane, methoxyflurane, sevoflurane) and/or succinylcholine as compared to patients with the GG genotype. Other genetic or clinical factors may also influence the risk for malignant hyperthermia.
riskSummary: RYR1 variant associated with toxicity for desflurane
detail: Patients with the rs118192168 AA genotype may develop malignant hyperthermia when treated with volatile anesthetics (desflurane, enflurane, halothane, isoflurane, methoxyflurane, sevoflurane) and/or succinylcholine as compared to patients with the GG genotype. Other genetic or clinical factors may also influence the risk for malignant hyperthermia.
whyItMatters: PharmGKB curates pharmacogenomic evidence from the literature, with level 1A–2B annotations backed by expert review and published clinical studies.

title: RYR1 / desflurane
summary: Patients with the rs118192168 GG genotype may have a decreased, but not absent, risk for malignant hyperthermia based on this variant when treated with volatile anesthetics (desflurane, enflurane, halothane, isoflurane, methoxyflurane, sevoflurane) and/or succinylcholine as compared to patients with the AA or AG genotype. Other genetic or clinical factors may also influence the risk for malignant hyperthermia.
